languages.text: "Хорошо. Я внесу посещение техножрецов Алтаря-Темплума в свои планы".
"Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."
languages.original_text: "Хорошо. Я внесу посещение техножрецов Алтаря-Темплума в свои планы".

traits.locale_text: "Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."
"Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."

languages.text: "Also schön. Ich werde einen Besuch bei den Techpriestern von Altar-Templum in meine Pläne einbeziehen."
languages.original_text: "Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: "Also schön. Ich werde einen Besuch bei den Techpriestern von Altar-Templum in meine Pläne einbeziehen."

languages.text: « Très bien. Je vais revoir mes plans afin d'y inclure une visite aux technoprêtres d'Altar-Templum. »
languages.original_text: "Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: « Très bien. Je vais revoir mes plans afin d'y inclure une visite aux technoprêtres d'Altar-Templum. »

languages.text: “很好。我会将拜访祭坛技术神甫的事纳入行程。”
languages.original_text: "Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: “很好。我会将拜访祭坛技术神甫的事纳入行程。”

languages.text: «Muy bien. Ajustaré mis planes para incluir una visita a los tecnosacerdotes de Altar-Templum».
languages.original_text: "Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: «Muy bien. Ajustaré mis planes para incluir una visita a los tecnosacerdotes de Altar-Templum».

languages.text: "よろしい。アルタール＝テンプラムのテクノギークを訪問することにしよう」。
languages.original_text: "Good. I'll put a visit to the Altar-Templum techno-geeks in my plans."

languages.text: "Pekâlâ. Planlarımı Altar-Templum Tekno Rahiplerini ziyareti içerecek şekilde ayarlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: "Pekâlâ. Planlarımı Altar-Templum Tekno Rahiplerini ziyareti içerecek şekilde ayarlayacağım."
